evals.description: Local business with brand affiliations — verifies queries include brand-specific terms
assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
queries_tested array contains at least 6 queries
At least one query in queries_tested includes 'Denver' or 'CO'
At least one query in queries_tested includes 'Control4' or 'Lutron'
Each query result has query, target_position (number or null), local_pack_present (boolean), target_in_local_pack (boolean), and top_competitors fields
visibility_rate is a number between 0 and 1
local_pack_appearances is a non-negative integer
directory_presence object contains google_business_profile, yelp, houzz, homeadvisor, and angi fields — each with found (boolean) and any available review data
nap_consistency object is present with issues array
top_competitors array contains competitor names found in search results
summary object with critical_gaps, quick_wins, and visibility_score fields is present
Output contains no recommendations — critical_gaps and quick_wins describe data findings only

evals.description: Business with no brand affiliations — brand-specific queries omitted
assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
queries_tested array contains at least 6 queries
All queries in queries_tested relate to plumbing or Chicago
visibility_rate, directory_presence, and nap_consistency fields are present
No brand-specific queries are present (since brand_affiliations was not provided)

evals.description: Business not found in any directories — all directory fields null or false
assertions: Returns valid JSON — does not error when directory profiles are missing
directory_presence fields may have found: false for all platforms
visibility_rate may be 0 if business does not appear in any tested queries
critical_gaps is a non-empty array when visibility is zero
